frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment: Yaar I get that women have safety concerns, but every guy getting treated like a threat is also unfair. Main toh aisa banda nahi hoon, so if someone acts scared for no reason it honestly feels insulting — not all men deserve that label.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it recenters male hurt and demands women moderate their safety behavior to avoid offending 'good guys.' It reflects the 'not all men' dismissal, centering self-identification as harmless, and framing women's wariness as unfair to men.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
